title: Bear Wolf attacks first during battle

card.rawText: This creature always attacks first during battle.

plan.title: Bear Wolf attacks first during battle
plan.summary: Put Bear Wolf into battle against a faster defender and verify Bear Wolf still takes the first strike.

notes: Use a synthetic SPD 12 defender so normal speed comparison would put Bear Wolf second.

steps: Set Bear Wolf as player_1 primary and the faster synthetic creature as player_2 primary.
Declare battle and run the speed check.

expectedAssertions.label: Bear Wolf takes the first strike despite lower SPD

manualVerification: Confirm the priority override only affects battle order, not hit or damage math.
riskNotes: This fixture uses a faster synthetic defender to prove the priority override matters.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Bear Wolf battle priority override.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
